title: {Additions} A Vanilla+ Experience
description: {Additions} is a Vanilla+ based Modpack with new terrain generation, optimisation, new mobs, new blocks, visual improvements and more!
body:
![Additions Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3e77429c70352c97d322f7e2031a3d94e5e5be3_0.webp)


![Kinetic Hosting Partner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1635da2bcb7fd62c235d7b62787992b21d22a9e_0.webp)
[Need a Server? Get 25% off your first month!]([https://billing.kinetichosting.net/affiliates.php](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=855)) \
[Our Website](https://www.fabimvurice-interactive.de)

 **Are you ready for the ultimate Vanilla+ Experience?** \
 Additions is the perfect Vanilla+ Modpack 
 for you! It has great performance, Overhauled Biomes, Overhauled Nether + END,
 New Food and Crops, New Mobs and more.. 


![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8adee0720f1f30513120134e41ec0d2127070d09.png)

## Performance
This Modpack adds many Performance Tweaks!\
Perfect for low end systems!\
Shader Support!

##  {Vanilla+ Additions}
Overhauled Biomes\
Play with your Friends without the need to Host a Server!\
Overhauled Nether + END\
New Structures\
New Blocks\
New Food and Crops\
New Visual Effects\
New Sounds\
New Tools\
New Armor\
New Ores\
Many new Mobs\
and more...
